---
title: "Welcome"
---

Hi, I'm Sarah Huet! I am a [Your Profession/Researcher], specializing in [Your Field, e.g., environmental data science, R, and Python]. 

Welcome to my personal website. Below you can explore my projects, background, and talks.

::: {layout-ncol=3}

### [My CV](CV/cv.html)
Read about my academic and professional background, publications, and skills.

### [FADN2Footprint](FADN2Footprint/fadn2footprint.qmd)
Discover my project bridging the Farm Accountancy Data Network to environmental footprints.

### [Media](Media/media.qmd)
Watch videos of my recent conference talks and public presentations.

:::
